final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: rural landscape photography, wide horizontal crop
Primary request: aerial and telephoto composite view of rapeseed flower fields in full bloom across an ancient Jiangnan village in Zhejiang, China, during the canola flower season
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese village in Zhejiang province, rolling hills with tea terraces in the distance, clear blue sky with scattered white clouds; morning light at approximately 10 AM
Subject: vast golden rapeseed flower fields stretching to the horizon; traditional white-walled black-tiled Huizhou-style village houses scattered among the flowers with wisps of cooking smoke rising from rooftops; a clear shallow river in the foreground crossed by an ancient stone arch bridge with weeping willows trailing tender green branches in the breeze; neatly terraced tea gardens on distant hills forming geometric green textures; a few villagers in traditional rural clothing working in the fields
Style/medium: photorealistic landscape photography, blend of drone aerial shot and ground-level telephoto lens
Composition/framing: wide panoramic framing combining high aerial overview and compressed telephoto perspective; layered depth from foreground river and bridge through mid-ground flower fields to background tea terraces and sky
Lighting/mood: natural morning sunlight at 10 AM, soft and even, warm golden tone; poetic, vibrant, and full of rural life
Color palette: dominant golden yellow (rapeseed flowers) + fresh green (willow branches, tea terraces) + white and dark grey (traditional architecture) + clear blue sky + white clouds; moderate color saturation, not oversaturated
Materials/textures: delicate rapeseed flower petals, rough aged stone arch bridge surface, smooth river water with subtle reflections, ceramic roof tiles, soft trailing willow branches
Constraints: preserve the authentic Jiangnan rural atmosphere; keep human figures small-scale to emphasize the vast landscape; maintain poetic and lively mood throughout
Avoid: oversaturated HDR look, artificial color grading, modern buildings or vehicles, tourist-crowd feel, flat or overcast lighting
